case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES VS. JUAN JEREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1) COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 17192035) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEREZ, JUAN $1,907.19 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,148.19, SEE SCANNED DOC
